---
title: "car1"
generated: true
description: "Continuous-time AR(1) for unequally-spaced times (`nlme` `corCAR1`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._corr`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:car1 -->
```python
car1() -> CorrSpec
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:car1 -->
Continuous-time AR(1) for unequally-spaced times (`nlme` `corCAR1`).

The correlation matrix is $R_{ij} = \rho^{|t_i - t_j|}$ with
$\rho \in (0, 1)$ (a positive decay), parameterised as
$\rho = \operatorname{sigmoid}(\text{raw})$.  The innovations
coefficient $\phi_t = \rho^{\Delta t_t}$ is the decay over the time gap
to the previous in-group observation; discrete AR(1) is the unit-gap special
case.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:car1 -->
**Parameters**

*No parameters.*

**Returns** `CorrSpec`. A correlation structure whose whitener applies the innovations recurrence with the gap-dependent coefficient $\phi_t = \rho^{\Delta t_t}$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
